title: Instrument d'adhésion du Vanuatu

pages.text:
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22

November 1928:

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocols of 10 May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31

May 1988:

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the 1972 Protocol provides to the effect that the Protocol shall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29

November 1973:

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of Vanuatu hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, 1, George Andre Wells, Minister of Foreign Affairs, have signed the present Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Ministry of

Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Vanuatu to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Port Vila, Vanuatu, on the 19" day of October in the year of two thousand and seven.

George Andre WELLS =

Minister of Foreign Affairs

Republic of Vanuatu
